title: azedarach sempervirens var. dubia
intro: Azedarach sempervirens var. dubia, commonly known as the Chinese evergreen or the Chinese parasol tree, is a deciduous tree native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing compounds like azadirachtin, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Azedarach sempervirens var. dubia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
